title: Entity Tweaks Configuration
description: Control which entities can spawn with a simple config. Vanilla and Modded!
body:
![tweaks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5192c495c072fddc8b8b76891298b10407241aa0.png)

**⚙️ Entity Tweaks Configuration**

Take full control over your world by customizing which entities are allowed to spawn.

With Entity Tweaks Configuration, you can easily disable any entity — whether it's vanilla or modded — through a simple and powerful config system.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**✨ Features**

🧠 Disable any entity spawn via config

🌍 Works with vanilla & modded entities

⚡ Lightweight and performance-friendly

🔧 Simple and easy-to-use configuration

🎮 Perfect for modpacks & server customization

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

📁 How to Configure

Go to your modpack folder
Open the config folder

Navigate to:

config/entity_tweaks/

4. Open:
entity_spawns.cfg

📝 Example
To disable an entity from spawning, set it to: minecraft:strider = false

✔️ true = entity can spawn
❌ false = entity is disabled

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d56a50d6d526926a8892cf3fee1d9bc14024d945.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

⚠️ Important Notes

🏗️ Monster spawners are NOT affected

🥚 Spawn eggs will still work normally

🎮 This mod only controls natural spawning

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

💡 Use Cases

Remove annoying mobs 😤

Balance your modpack ⚖️

Improve performance 🚀

Create custom survival experiences 🌲

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

💬 Support & Compatibility

Having issues or a mod not working correctly?

👉 Join our [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/V2MqnY7Za3) and submit a mod compatibility request
We actively improve support for more mods!

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
